instruction: Help me register the project information in the spreadsheet

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Project Name: Smart Customer Service System Upgrade
Project ID: PRJ-2025-008
Responsible Dept: Technology Dept
Project Manager: Lin Zhiwei
Planned Start: 2025-04-01
Planned Completion: 2025-09-30
Total Budget: 850K CNY
Priority: High' > /home/user/Desktop/project_brief.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Project ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Project Name'; ws['C1'] = 'Manager'; ws['D1'] = 'Budget(10K CNY)'; ws['E1'] = 'Priority'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/project_register.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me register the project information in the spreadsheet

Fill the project information from /home/user/Desktop/project_brief.txt into /home/user/Desktop/project_register.xlsx row 2: A2='PRJ-2025-008', B2='Smart Customer Service System Upgrade', C2='Lin Zhiwei', D2=85, E2='High', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/project_register.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'PRJ-2025-008' in s else 'FAILED')"
